title: Bauer Professional 38780 Men’s Electric Shaver/Three Flexible Rotary Heads/Ergonomic Grip/Pop-Up Sideburn Trimmer/Cordless & Rechargeable/Head, Face & Body Shaver
features: MEN’S ELECTRIC SHAVER – This Mens Electric Shaver from Bauer is designed to meet all of your personal grooming needs! Featuring 3 stainless steel heads, it is designed to ensure a smoother and more comfortable shave, thanks to the flexible rotary head design on each of the heads.

WORKS ALL OVER – Thanks to the shaver’s design, it can be used to shave in multiple places, being suitable for your head, face, as well as on the body. Additionally, the shaver also features a pop-up sideburn trimmer, to allow you to precisely control your look.

CONVENIENT & COMFORTABLE – The shaver features a helpful charging indicator light, as well as a comfortable, ergonomic grip that makes use easy and convenient. The shaver head can also be removed for washing, making cleaning simple and safe.

CORDLESS & RECHARGEABLE – The cordless nature of the shaver makes it even more convenient than before, allowing you to use it anywhere without worrying about needing a socket nearby. The shaver is easily recharged via the included A/C charging adaptor, and with a charge time of 8 hours, it can safely be plugged in overnight ready for use in the morning.
BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of top-quality hair, beauty & personal care products. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product description Bauer Professional is leading the way in the manufacturing of innovative and high-quality hair and beauty goods for both women and men. From hair dryers, straighteners and curlers to skin cleanser brushes, shavers and nail care kits, you can find whatever you need to enhance your beauty regime in the Bauer range. This Electric Shaver for men is designed by Bauer to meet all of your personal shaving needs! It features 3 flexible rotary heads, made from stainless steel, to ensure a precise, smooth shave every time. You can use the shaver on your head, face, and body, for ideal results all over, and it also features a pop-up sideburn trimmer for a precision shave on the sides of your face. The shaver is comfortable and convenient to use, with a nice ergonomic grip, and a removable head that can be safely washed to make cleaning quick and easy. The shaver can be used corded or cordless, being rechargeable for convenient cordless use. It features a handy charging indicator light, and takes 8 hours to charge, allowing you to safely plug it in overnight and use it to shave in the morning. Safety Warning WARNING: Do not use the shaver near water while charging. Keep the shaver away from water sources to prevent the risk of electric shock. Always handle the shaver with care to avoid cuts from the sharp blades. Always unplug the shaver from the power source before cleaning or charging. Always allow the shaver to cool down before handling or storing it.
